body: US stock market futures slipped as investors reacted to Middle East tensions, OECD global growth warning, and changing Federal Reserve rate
The three major averages opened in the red on Tuesday morning. The Dow Jones Industrial Average lost 101 points, or 0.2%. The S&P 500 fell 0.3%,
US stock futures are down due to rising oil prices, Iran conflict risks, and reduced expectations of rate cuts. Market direction depends on
